_publications._publicationTitle: Using antisense oligonucleotides for the physiological modulation of the alternative splicing of NF1 exon 23a during PC12 neuronal differentiation.

_contextSnippet: We tested different concentrations of PMO and successfully induced almost complete E23a skipping at lowest concentration tested of PMO-SkpE23a after 24 h
details: PMO-SkpE23a successfully induced almost complete E23a skipping at lowest concentration tested after 24 h in HEK293T cells
